mapper.select: SELECT UserID AS userId, UserName AS userName FROM ComMember WHERE UserID = #{userId} AND UserPW = #{password} AND UseYn = 'Y'
SELECT UserID AS userId, UserName AS userName, UseYn AS useYn FROM ComMember ORDER BY UserID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ComMember ( UserID, UserPW, UserName, UseYn, InsertUserID, InsertDate ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{password}, #{userName}, #{useYn}, #{insertUserId}, GETDATE() )
